title: wedelia pimana
intro: Wedelia pimana, also known as the Mexican daisy or golden flower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Wedelia pimana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wedelia pimana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, sore throats, and skin conditions.
